def eligible_for_hunting_license(self) -> bool:
        valid_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_ages = range(18, 100)
        valid_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_status = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_education = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        valid_marital_status = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        valid_religions = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
        valid_safety_course_completed = ['yes', 'no']

        if (self.gender in valid_genders and
            self.age in valid_ages and
            self.race in valid_races and
            self.employment_status in valid_employment_status and
            self.education in valid_education and
            self.marital_status in valid_marital_status and
            self.religion in valid_religions and
            self.safety_course_completed in valid_safety_course_completed):
            return True
        else:
            return False
